description: Explicit human governance decisions. Eligibility and lifecycle must derive from these records, not silent backtest metrics.

promotions.name: Equity-Bond Correlation Regime
promotions.rationale: Phase 2 robustness selected 21-day rebalance for regime persistence, turnover control, and OOS consistency. Strategy replaces archived Index Arbitrage Proxy in the active 20-strategy universe while remaining unallocated pending manual governance.

archived_strategies.name: Index Arbitrage Proxy
archived_strategies.rationale: Daily ETF basis edge consumed by transaction costs; archived with full historical research evidence preserved.
